PYACS 0.66.20
  • PYACS core libraries
  • pyacs.lib.gmtpoint
  • View page source

pyacs.lib.gmtpoint

GMT psvelo-style point with position and optional velocity.

add_to_gmt_psvelo

Add GMT_Point to a GMT psvelo file.

assign_index

Assign index for GMT_Point.

copy

Copy method for GMT_Point.

get_index

Return index of GMT_Point.

get_info

Print information for GMT_Point.

gmt_point

GMT_Point class: position and optional velocity (GMT psvelo style).

magaz

Magnitude and azimuth of velocity for GMT_Point.

midpoint

Midpoint between two GMT_Points.

pole

Euler pole prediction for GMT_Point.

rotate_vel

Rotate velocity components for GMT_Point.

spherical_distance

Spherical distance for GMT_Point.
